priceNote_en: Prices and previous closes are the most recent figures available from web sources at generation time and may lag true real-time pre-market quotes.
priceNote_zh: 价格及前收盘价为生成时从网络来源获取的最新数据,可能与真实盘前实时报价存在滞后。
disclaimer_en: This briefing is for informational and entertainment purposes only as part of the AI Stock Arena game. It is not investment advice. Prices, news summaries, and AI predictions may contain errors; verify with official sources before making financial decisions.
disclaimer_zh: 本简报仅作为「AI股票竞技场」游戏的信息与娱乐内容,不构成投资建议。价格、新闻摘要及AI预测可能存在误差,请在做出财务决策前核实官方来源。
predictionNote_en: AI predictions represent the game's AI opponent's own pre-open estimates for today's gap (open vs prior close) and full-day close, not analyst forecasts.
predictionNote_zh: AI预测代表游戏AI对手在开盘前对今日跳空(开盘价对前收盘价)及全天收盘的自主估计,并非分析师预测。

items.title_en: Nvidia's Blackwell sold out through mid-2026 as Rubin arrives early
items.title_zh: 英伟达Blackwell芯片订单排至2026年年中,Rubin架构提前到货
items.summary_en: Nvidia's Blackwell AI accelerators remain sold out through mid-2026 on extraordinary demand, and the next-generation Rubin architecture, originally slated for 2027, is now expected roughly two quarters ahead of schedule. Nvidia also hired a Microsoft sales veteran to lead field operations.
items.summary_zh: 英伟达Blackwell AI加速器因需求旺盛,订单已排至2026年年中；原定2027年推出的下一代Rubin架构预计将提前约两个季度到货。英伟达还挖来一位微软销售业务高管负责现场运营。

items.title_en: Washington codifies AI chip tariffs and eases some China export rules
items.title_zh: 华盛顿将AI芯片关税制度化,同时放宽部分对华出口限制
items.summary_en: The administration has imposed a 25% value-based tariff on advanced AI chips not destined for the US supply chain and barred Blackwell chip sales to China, Iran, North Korea, Russia and Venezuela for two years. Separately, Commerce shifted its China export-license review from presumption of denial to case-by-case, even as Congress pushes tougher restrictions.
items.summary_zh: 美国政府对非供美国供应链使用的先进AI芯片征收25%从价关税,并禁止Blackwell芯片向中国、伊朗、朝鲜、俄罗斯和委内瑞拉出口两年。与此同时,商务部将对华出口许可审查从'推定拒绝'改为'个案审查',但国会仍在推动更严格的限制措施。

items.title_en: Micron breaks ground on $9.3B Hiroshima expansion after blowout quarter
items.title_zh: 美光在广岛启动93亿美元扩产项目,此前公布亮眼季报
items.summary_en: Micron started work on a ¥1.5 trillion ($9.3 billion) expansion of its Hiroshima memory fab and posted fiscal Q3 sales of $41.46 billion, far above the $35.84 billion analyst estimate. The stock has since given back gains amid memory-glut worries, though Wall Street and Nvidia's Jensen Huang offered supportive comments on July 5.
items.summary_zh: 美光启动其广岛存储芯片工厂1.5万亿日元(93亿美元)的扩产项目,并公布2026财年第三季度营收414.6亿美元,远超分析师预期的358.4亿美元。此后股价因存储芯片供应过剩担忧回吐涨幅,但华尔街及英伟达CEO黄仁勋于7月5日发表了支持性言论。

items.title_en: TSMC and ASML earnings loom as capex outlook stays bullish
items.title_zh: 台积电、ASML财报临近,资本支出前景仍乐观
items.summary_en: TSMC reports Q2 2026 results July 16 and ASML follows July 15, with investors watching order intake for signs of chipmaker demand beyond TSMC. ASML shares have surged roughly 80% year-to-date on AI-driven equipment demand, while TSMC, up over 45% YTD, plans to raise 2026 capex further, benefiting its lithography supplier.
items.summary_zh: 台积电将于7月16日公布2026年第二季度财报,ASML将于7月15日发布财报,投资者关注订单情况以判断台积电以外芯片厂商的需求。ASML股价年内因AI驱动的设备需求上涨约80%,台积电年内涨幅超45%,并计划进一步上调2026年资本支出,利好其光刻机供应商。

items.title_en: Broadcom's AI silicon revenue more than doubles, guides Q3 to $16B
items.title_zh: 博通AI芯片营收翻倍以上,预计第三季度达160亿美元
items.summary_en: Broadcom's Q2 FY26 revenue hit $22.19 billion, up 48% year-over-year, with AI semiconductor revenue of $10.8 billion up 143% YoY. Management guided Q3 AI semiconductor revenue to $16 billion, implying growth of more than 200%, even as the stock has lagged AMD and Intel's 2026 gains.
items.summary_zh: 博通2026财年第二季度营收达221.9亿美元,同比增长48%,其中AI半导体营收达108亿美元,同比增长143%。管理层预计第三季度AI半导体营收将达160亿美元,意味着增长超过200%,尽管该股今年以来涨幅落后于AMD和英特尔。

items.title_en: Marvell shares swing sharply as analysts weigh AI custom-silicon growth
items.title_zh: 马维尔股价剧烈波动,分析师权衡AI定制芯片增长前景
items.summary_en: Marvell's Data Center segment revenue reached $1.83 billion with total revenue up 27.6% to $2.418 billion, and management guided next quarter to roughly 35% growth. Shares have been highly volatile, rallying nearly 40% after earnings before giving back close to 10% in a single recent session amid broader AI infrastructure jitters.
items.summary_zh: 马维尔数据中心业务营收达18.3亿美元,总营收同比增长27.6%至24.18亿美元,管理层预计下季度增速约35%。该股波动剧烈,财报后一度上涨近40%,但随后在AI基础设施担忧加剧下单日回吐近10%涨幅。

items.title_en: Lumentum caught in photonics sell-off despite surging AI optics demand
items.title_zh: 光子学板块遭抛售,朗美通受累,尽管AI光学需求激增
items.summary_en: Lumentum shares fell over 9% in a recent session amid a sector-wide AI-photonics sell-off and removal from several Russell indices, even as fiscal Q3 revenue grew over 90% and demand for data-center optical components reportedly outstrips supply by more than 30%.
items.summary_zh: 朗美通股价近期单日下跌超9%,受累于AI光子学板块整体抛售及被剔除出多个罗素指数,尽管其2026财年第三季度营收增长超90%,数据中心光学组件需求据报道超出供给逾30%。

items.title_en: SanDisk NAND shortage narrative intact after wild week of swings
items.title_zh: SanDisk NAND短缺逻辑仍在,尽管本周股价剧烈波动
items.summary_en: SanDisk data center revenue reached $1.467 billion, up 233% quarter-on-quarter and 645% year-on-year, and the company began production of 10th-generation 3D NAND with Kioxia through an extended joint venture to 2034. The stock has swung sharply this week on memory-glut fears even as some analysts flag ongoing shortage risk.
items.summary_zh: SanDisk数据中心业务营收达14.67亿美元,环比增长233%,同比增长645%,并已与铠侠(Kioxia)启动第十代3D NAND量产,双方合资合作延长至2034年。尽管部分分析师仍指出短缺风险持续存在,该股本周因存储芯片供应过剩担忧而剧烈波动。

items.title_en: Deloitte flags 50% memory price spike as chip 'crisis' ripples downstream
items.title_zh: 德勤警告存储芯片价格或飙升50%,'危机'波及下游产业
items.summary_en: Deloitte's 2026 Semiconductor Industry Outlook projects roughly 50% price spikes for essential memory components by mid-year, disrupting downstream sectors, while a deepening memory chip crisis and a cautious AI chip outlook from Broadcom triggered a broad chip-sector sell-off on June 5.
items.summary_zh: 德勤发布的2026年半导体行业展望预计,核心存储芯片价格到年中或飙升约50%,冲击下游产业；6月5日,存储芯片危机加深叠加博通谨慎的AI芯片展望,引发芯片板块全面抛售。

items.title_en: Chip stocks rebound pre-market as soft jobs report boosts rate-cut bets
items.title_zh: 疲软就业数据提振降息预期,芯片股盘前反弹
items.summary_en: Nasdaq futures climbed over 1% pre-market on July 6 with SMH indicated up about 2.4% as chip stocks rebounded from Friday's slide. June payrolls added just 57,000 jobs versus roughly double that expected, lifting September rate-cut odds to 60-65% even as the Dow closed at a record high.
items.summary_zh: 7月6日,纳斯达克期货盘前上涨逾1%,VanEck半导体ETF(SMH)盘前涨约2.4%,芯片股从上周五的跌势中反弹。6月非农就业仅增加5.7万人,约为预期的一半,推高9月降息概率至60%-65%,同期道指收于历史新高。

NVDA.rationale_en: Blackwell sold out through mid-2026 and an accelerated Rubin timeline support sentiment, plus a broad pre-market tech rebound and firmer rate-cut odds.
NVDA.rationale_zh: Blackwell订单排至2026年年中及Rubin架构提前推出支撑市场情绪,叠加科技股盘前普遍反弹及降息预期升温。

MU.rationale_en: Oversold bounce likely after a multi-day slide despite a blowout Q3 beat, 16 multiyear customer deals, and supportive comments from Jensen Huang.
MU.rationale_zh: 尽管第三季度业绩大幅超预期、达成16项多年期客户合约,且黄仁勋发表支持性言论,该股经历多日下跌后可能出现超跌反弹。

ASML.rationale_en: Profit-taking likely into the July 15 earnings date after an 80% YTD surge and fading stock-split speculation.
ASML.rationale_zh: 在7月15日财报公布前,年内涨幅约80%后可能出现获利了结,拆股猜测热度也有所降温。

AVGO.rationale_en: Q3 AI semiconductor revenue guidance of $16B (200%+ growth) and BlackRock's top-AI-stock mention should keep buyers engaged after a big single-day pop.
AVGO.rationale_zh: 第三季度AI半导体营收指引达160亿美元(增速超200%),叠加贝莱德将其列为顶级AI股,单日大涨后买盘料将持续。

TSM.rationale_en: Pre-earnings optimism ahead of the July 16 report and plans to raise 2026 capex further support continued momentum.
TSM.rationale_zh: 7月16日财报前市场情绪乐观,叠加公司计划进一步上调2026年资本支出,支撑股价延续涨势。

MRVL.rationale_en: High volatility likely to persist after an outsized single-day drop, with lingering concerns about custom-silicon competitive positioning.
MRVL.rationale_zh: 单日大幅下跌后波动性料将持续,市场对其定制芯片业务竞争地位的担忧仍存。

LITE.rationale_en: Sector-wide AI-photonics sell-off and index-removal technical overhang likely to outweigh strong underlying optics demand near-term.
LITE.rationale_zh: AI光子学板块整体抛售及指数剔除的技术性压力,短期内可能压过强劲的光学需求基本面。

SNDK.rationale_en: NAND shortage narrative and surging data-center SSD demand support a bounce after a volatile week, though swings should stay wide.
SNDK.rationale_zh: NAND短缺逻辑及数据中心SSD需求激增支撑股价在剧烈波动的一周后反弹,但波幅预计仍将较大。

AMD.rationale_en: Some profit-taking likely after a huge year-to-date run as capital rotates toward AI software names.
AMD.rationale_zh: 在年内大幅上涨后,资金可能轮动至AI软件股,该股或出现获利了结。

SMH.rationale_en: Broad semiconductor rebound indicated pre-market after Friday's slide, with the ETF up around 2.4% ahead of the open.
SMH.rationale_zh: 继上周五下跌后,半导体板块盘前显示普遍反弹,该ETF开盘前涨约2.4%。
